summary: An undercover operative infiltrates the Southern Star guard to investigate Jin Ryong, a demoted former leader of the Heavenly Dragon Troop. After observing the unit's internal dynamics, the protagonist reveals their identity as a leader of the Deep Sky Sect and approaches Jin Ryong with a shared grudge against Jintae. By exploiting Jin Ryong’s desire for vengeance and reclaiming his status, the protagonist successfully recruits him into a plan to challenge their common enemy.
key_moments: The protagonist infiltrates the Southern Star guard and observes the lazy, nominal leadership of Captain Jin Ryong.
The protagonist reveals their true identity and motivations to Jin Ryong, highlighting their shared enemy, Jintae.
Jin Ryong agrees to align with the protagonist to seek revenge and reclaim his former power.
